summary: All five requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (manifest.json) is fully configured with standalone display, start_url, scope, orientation, and both 192x192/512x512 maskable icons. REQ-2 (service worker) has a bumped cache version (finfit-v4), pre-caches app shell assets, handles offline navigation gracefully, and uses skipWaiting/clients.claim(). REQ-3 (responsive/mobile layout) has min-h-[56px] bottom nav buttons, 16px font-size enforcement on inputs via CSS, and overflow-x-hidden on main content. REQ-4 (SW registration) is guarded by 'serviceWorker' in navigator, HTTPS/localhost check, and error logging. REQ-5 (Apple meta tags) are all present in index.html including apple-touch-icon. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.
